title: Act 1 - Part 2 - The Legend of Heroes: Trails of Cold Steel II Walkthrough
markdown:
### December 5th

* * *

Leave town through **Ymir Valley**. Select two members from Class VII, and one guest character (Claire or Toval) to bring with you. You won't have the option to select your party member after the decision is set, so make sure you chose your ideal team.

**Nord Highlands - South, Part: A**

\- Advertisement -

[![Trails of cold steel ii nord highlands south.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/5/54/Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_nord_highlands_south.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_nord_highlands_south.png)

| Enemy Name | Item Drop 1 | Item Drop 2 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Winged Snake | White Beast Flesh | Globby Fat |
| Grass Hopper | Assorted Grains | Red Beast Flesh |
| Brutal Infant | Fresh Milk | Red Beast Flesh |
| Thunder Loach | White Beast Flesh | U-Material |
| Ostrich | Red Beast Flesh | Globby Fat |
| Brutal Buffa | Mature Cheese | Chitinous Shell |
| Thunder Quaker | White Beast Flesh | U-Material |
| Treasure | Location |
| --- | --- |
| Curia Balm | Nord Highlands - South |
| Marble Ring |
| EP Charge II |
| Ingenuity |
| Teara |
| Cloud Shoes |
| Sepith Mass x200 | Nord Highlands - South (Accessible for later) |
| Breeze Jacket |
| Recipe: Potato Croquette | Marx: Zender Gates - Mess Hall |
| --- | --- |
| Recipe: Hot Milk Tea | Old Lady Jedah: Lake Lacrima - Elder's Camp |
| Book: Gambler Jack II - Chapter 3 | San: Lake Lacrima - Doctor's Camp |
| Book: Gambler Jack Reprint #3 | General Store - Kilte's Store(Lake Lacrima) |

After the event scene, your party will be warp to the northwest area of **Nord Highlands - South**. Since the Nord Highlands is really big, use the map above as a reference of all the treasure chest. When you reach the middle section an event scene will occur, then go southwest to **Zender Gate**. Watch the event, you will receive a horse for you to ride on. Go back inside Zender Gate and speak to **Marx** at the Mess Hall, he will teach you the [Potato Croquette](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Recipe_List#Potato_Croquette "walkthrough/Recipe List") recipe and purchase new weapons from Zender Gate, but not armor because there is stronger equipment in the upcoming area (Lake Lacrima). You can also find some of your classmates here, there is Beryl at the Mess Hall and Mint who is just outside of Zender Gate. Now leave Zender Gate, the game won't let you access the southeast area yet, so wait for later if you intend on picking up the treasure chests. Now go to the **Nord Settlement** located at the **northeast end** of the map. A boss battle will ensue afterwards.

| Boss | HP | Elemental Efficacy | Item Drop | Slash | Trust | Pierce | Strike |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Jaeger - Greatsword | 11229 (Normal) | 100, 100, 100, 100 | Curia Balm, Reviving Balm | ★☆☆☆ | ★☆☆☆ | ★☆☆☆ | ★☆☆☆ |
| Jaeger - Rifle | 10488 (Normal) | 100, 100, 100, 100 | Teara Balm, EP Charge II | ★☆☆☆ | ★☆☆☆ | ★☆☆☆ | ★☆☆☆ |
| The Jaegers can deal a massive amount of damage to your party, each member can hit for 2000 to 3500 damage per hit. This battle will get ugly if you don't finish off the Jaegers quickly. They also have the ability to resurrect their allies. If you want to cheese through this battle, you can quickly buff your party members and use either Toval or Claire's S-Craft depending on who you bring with you. |

**Lake Lacrima**

After the event scene, **Gaius** will join your party. Head to **Elder's House** and speak to Old Lady **Jedah**, she will teach you the [Hot Milk Tea](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Recipe_List#Hot_Milk_Tea "walkthrough/Recipe List") recipe. Then go to the **Doctor's House**, and speak to San the girl right next to Dr. Amr, she will give you a copy of **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 3**. Now also, purchase a copy of **Gambler Jack Reprint #3** at the general store. You can also fish on the pier near the boat. When you all finish to go, leave Lake Lacrima to Nord Highlands - North.

**Nord Highlands - North**

You need to go to **Nord Highlands - Northeast**, that is location is located by the **southeast exit**. Gaius will prevent you from going to the south region of the map, so just go directly to your destination.

[![Trails of cold steel ii nord highlands north.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/e/e8/Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_nord_highlands_north.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_nord_highlands_north.png)

| Enemy Name | Item Drop 1 | Item Drop 2 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Creepy Sheep | Mint Drop | Red Beast Flesh |
| Infant Drango | Cooling Spray | White Beast Flesh |
| White Fang | Red Beast Flesh | Globby Fat |
| Zaurtoise | White Beast Flesh | Chitinous Shell |
| Rhinocider | Chitinous Shell | U-Materia |
| Hippogriff | Hearty Powder | U-Material |
| Treasure | Location |
| --- | --- |
| Black Bangle | Nord Highlands - North |
| Sepith x100 |
| Cool Necklace |
| Move 2 |
| Curia Balm |
| Celestial Balm |
| Shiun Jacket |
| Gladiator Belt |

**Nord Highlands - Northeast**

Go east all the way to the end, when the path change direction, head to the south corner to find a Floral Bottle in a treasure chest and then continue on north. An event scene and a boss battle will occur.

|  |
| --- |
| Unsurtr | HP: 48360 | Item Drop: None |
| Elemental Efficacy | 120, 50, 150, 100, 100, 100, 100 |
| Unbalance Efficacy | Slash: ★☆☆☆ Thrust: ★☆☆☆ Pierce: ★☆☆☆ Strike:★☆☆☆ |
| Boss Skills | Icicle missiles. Area (M), can inflict Freeze.Frost Edge. Area (M), can inflict Freeze.Claw swipe. Single. |
| This boss isn't particularly challenging, but it does have a substantial amount of HP. With a full party, Alisa can use her craft, "Heavenly Gift," which will automatically regenerate your CP and provide the "Insight" buff. This allows you to easily dodge some of the boss's attacks. The boss is weak against fire-based attacks, so Fire arts, such as "Heatwave," equipped on Alisa, work effectively. Using all of your party's S-Crafts can quickly take down the boss without much trouble. Be cautious of the boss's strongest attack, "Frost Edge," which it can cast rapidly, potentially causing the Freeze ailment on your party. In the worst-case scenario, you can equip freeze freeze-resistant accessory before the fight starts. |
| Treasure | Location |
| --- | --- |
| Floral Bottle | Nord Highlands - Northeast |
| Harvest | Nord Highlands - Northeast (North Area) |
| Tearal Balm |
| U-Material x4 |

After the event scene, your party will be back in Lake Lacrima. The game will add the option to let you instantly travel to other parts of the Nord Highlands when you're outside on the navigation menu. There will be a bunch of side activities you can do, first go to the Elder's House and speak to the elder, he will give you a list of side quests for you to do. You can also explore some parts of the Nord Highlands that the game prevent you from going to earlier, allowing you pick up some of the treasure chests that you were missing. When you are exploring the Nord Highlands - North, you should also open the Trial Chest located at the center of the map, doing so will unlock the Overdrive function for Alisa & Millium. After this, you should work on the side quests.

| Trial Chest Boss | HP | Elemental Efficacy | Item Drop | Slash | Trust | Pierce | Strike |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Boss Dragon | 28080 (Normal) | 80, 200, 40, 120 | Heat Wave R | ★★☆☆ | ★★☆☆ | ★★★☆ | ★☆☆☆ |
| Infant Drango x7 | 4368 (Normal) | 80, 200, 40, 120 | Cooling Spray, White Beast Flesh | ★★☆☆ | ★★☆☆ | ★★★☆ | ★☆☆☆ |
| Boss Skills | Fireball. Single, can inflict Burn.Claw swipe. Single. |
| Although this boss doesn't hit really hard, most of the fire balls they breathe out can cause your party to burn which does a ton of damage over each turn. So equip Burn resistant accessories if you have them. If not then rely on Millium's S-Craft to instantly take out the infant dragons. Then have Alisa as your main healer or a CP provider with her Heavenly Gift ability. |

####  [![SubquestCS2.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/3/3d/SubquestCS2.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:SubquestCS2.png) Side Quest: Highlands Hunt

| Quest Name | Highlands Hunt / 高原に放たれた軍用魔獣 |
| --- | --- |
| After you have received the quest list from the Nord Elder. Leave Lake Lacrima and go to Nord Highlands - North. There will be three cougar type monsters marked on the map with a red circle.Enemy NameItem Drop 1Item Drop 2Galion CougarRed Beast FleshU-MaterialAfter you have defeated the three groups, return to Lake Lacrima and report to the elder to finish the quest. | Enemy Name | Item Drop 1 | Item Drop 2 | Galion Cougar | Red Beast Flesh | U-Material |
| Enemy Name | Item Drop 1 | Item Drop 2 |
| Galion Cougar | Red Beast Flesh | U-Material |
| Client | Lacan |
| Reward | Nord Bracelet, All Monster Ingredient x3, 1500 Mira, 4 AP |

####  [![SubquestCS2.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/3/3d/SubquestCS2.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:SubquestCS2.png) Side Quest: Foaling Around

| Quest Name | Foaling Around / 子馬の捜索 |
| --- | --- |
| At Lake Lacrima, go and speak to Sheeda, who is located in the northwest area near the group of sheep. Leave town and go to Nord Highlands - Northeast. You will find the foal at the southeast corner of the map. Once you approach near it, the foal will move to another location. The next location will be at the northeast end of the map. After this, you will find the foal at the Nord Settlement. You will automatically return to Lake Lacrima and the quest will end.Enemy NameItem Drop 1Item Drop 2Golden OwlFresh EggHearty PowderGrass MoleRed Beast FleshGlobby FatDiving AnantaWhite Beast FleshGlobby FatStony CroakerWhite Beast FleshChitinous ShellStone GolemChitinous ShellU-Material | Enemy Name | Item Drop 1 | Item Drop 2 | Golden Owl | Fresh Egg | Hearty Powder | Grass Mole | Red Beast Flesh | Globby Fat | Diving Ananta | White Beast Flesh | Globby Fat | Stony Croaker | White Beast Flesh | Chitinous Shell | Stone Golem | Chitinous Shell | U-Material |
| Enemy Name | Item Drop 1 | Item Drop 2 |
| Golden Owl | Fresh Egg | Hearty Powder |
| Grass Mole | Red Beast Flesh | Globby Fat |
| Diving Ananta | White Beast Flesh | Globby Fat |
| Stony Croaker | White Beast Flesh | Chitinous Shell |
| Stone Golem | Chitinous Shell | U-Material |
| Client | Sheeda |
| Reward | Food Ingredient x3, 2000 Mira, 4 AP |

Return back to the Nord Highlands - Northeast, and explore Aria Shrine located at the northwest exit. Clearing it will give you **3 AP**.

**Note:** There is a fishing spot near the entrance to Aria Shrine.

**Aria Shrine**

[![Trails of cold steel ii aria shrine.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/6/63/Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_aria_shrine.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_aria_shrine.png)

Head downstairs, and open the gate to enter Aria Shrine. then follow the path northwest, you will find a Trial Chest for Alisa and Gaius.

| Boss | HP | Elemental Efficacy | Item Drop | Slash | Trust | Pierce | Strike |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Emerald Ooze G | 30290 (Normal) | 80, 120, 100, 80, 120, 100, 140 | Chrono Drive R | ★★★★ | ★★☆☆ | ★☆☆☆ | ☆☆☆☆ |
| Emerald Ooze x2 | 5145 (Normal) | 100, 80, 120, 100, 100, 100, 100 | Clear Gelatin, Globby Fat | ★★★★ | ★★☆☆ | ★☆☆☆ | ☆☆☆☆ |
| If you have a full CP party, have Gaius use his Calamity Hawk to instantly wipe out the trash mob first. If not, then have Gaius use turbulence on the mobs, it should cause blindness on them and with Gaius' Insight buff (From his Falco master quartz) it should you allow him to dodge each attack with ease. When Gaius' Insight expires, you can use Alisa's Heavenly Gift to give insight and auto CP regen for Gaius. Just have Gaius tanking and use his S-Craft when his CP is full, if the boss manage to hit you, it will recover quite a bit of it's HP. |

After you have cleared the Trial Chest, climb up the ladder that is behind you. Then go to the southwest path, if you reach to the very corner, you will find an **Aerial** quartz in a treasure chest. Then go back to the center area and take the ladder down. Go north to the center, you will notice three switches, press the switch on the west side, it will lower the platform. Then go to the west end to find a **Sleep** Quartz. Run back and flip the same switch again to raise the platform. Then go to the center, and pick up the treasure chest on the north, which contains an **EP Charge II**. Then flip the switch to raise the platform. Then go to the east side, press the switch to lowered the platform, now climb up the ladder in front of you. Then go all the way west, open the chest to find some **Sepith Mass**, then go southwest to find the [Criminal](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Arts_and_Quartz#Criminal "walkthrough/Arts and Quartz") **Master Quartz** in a Monster Chest. Then head all the way to the north end, use the Orbment Charging Station and then open the gate to fight the boss.

| Enemy Name | Item Drop 1 | Item Drop 2 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Schlafen | Hearty Powder | Curia Balm |
| Emerald Ooze | Clear Gelatin | Globby Fat |
| Homing Mold | Clear Gelatin | U-Material |
| Solar Bee | Chitinous Shell | Hearty Powder |
| Treasure | Location |
| --- | --- |
| Aerial | Aria Shrine |
| Sleep |
| EP Charge II |
| Sepith Mass x200 |
| Criminal |
|  |
| --- |
| Tildawn - Pazuu x3 | HP: 38784 | Item Drop: Curia Balm, U-Material |
| Elemental Efficacy | 120, 100, 100, 0, 130, 130, 130 |
| Unbalance Efficacy | Slash: ★☆☆☆ Thrust: ★☆☆☆ Pierce: ★☆☆☆ Strike:★☆☆☆ |
| Boss Skills | Eye laser. Line.Black energy. All, can inflict Sleep.Green energy. All, heals enemy allies.Aerial. Area (M) (Air art). |
| This can be a pretty tough battle if you came unprepared. This boss is focused on using it's powerful area attack skills which can cause your party to fall asleep. If you have sleep resistant accessories, equip them before you come for this fight. Each boss can cast Aerial (a very powerful wind art). This does a ton of damage and can instantly K.O. party members. Another thing to bring is someone that can Impede, this will cancel their arts. As long as your party members are awake, you should able to cancel their cast and breeze through the fight. |

**Nord Highlands - South, Part: B**

| Quest: Zats Amore | Speak to Officer Zats or Manning at Zender Gates, store area. |
| --- | --- |
| Book: Gambler Jack II - Chapter 4 | Officer Ogrum: Zender Gates, store area. |

Head to the Nord Highlands - South, and then go to Zender Gates. Then speak to Officer Zats or Manning near the store area. Accept their offer to start a hidden quest. Then speak to Officer Ogram by the group officers, he will give you a copy of **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 4**. Explore the southern part of Nord Highlands and pick up whatever treasure chest you have missed including the **Trial Chest** at the southeast area of the map.

| Trial Chest Boss | HP | Elemental Efficacy | Item Drop | Slash | Trust | Pierce | Strike |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Megalon Buffa | 29884 (Normal) | 120, 100, 150, 100 | Breath R | ★★☆☆ | ★★★☆ | ★★☆☆ | ★★★☆ |
| Brutal Buffa x2 | 9960 (Normal) | 120, 100, 150, 100 | Chitinous Shell, Red Beast Flesh | ★★☆☆ | ★★★☆ | ★★☆☆ | ★★★☆ |
| This boss can hit you pretty hard, and it's also very quick allowing it to strike you consecutively at certain turns. Get rid of the smaller Buffa monsters first. Use your S-Craft if you have a full CP gauge. If not then rely on Gaius' Turbulence to blind them and Millium to use her Buster Arm to cause faint on them. Once you get rid of the trash mobs, focus on the boss, use one of your party members to tank, Millium can use her Shield ability to nullify physical hits and Gaius as an attacker or a backup healer. A different method would be using the trash mobs to block the main boss, so it doesn't get close to you and have your characters cast arts at it from a distance. |

####  [![QuesticonCS2.gif](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/c/c1/QuesticonCS2.gif)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:QuesticonCS2.gif) Hidden Quest: Zats Amore

* * *

Speak to Zats or Manning near the store area of Zender Gates. Accept their request and then head to Nord [Nord Highlands - South](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Act_1_Part_2#Nord_Highlands_South "walkthrough/Act 1 Part 2"). You'll need to examine the wreckage of each tank marked on the map with a green exclamation mark. In each wreckage, you'll find a shiny object to collect. When you examine the object in the 4th wreckage, you'll discover a pendant. Return to Zender Gate and give the pendant to Zats.

| Client | Zats |
| --- | --- |
| Reward and AP | EP Charge x5, 2000 Mira, 4 AP |

[![MarginCS2Test.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/a/a4/MarginCS2Test.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:MarginCS2Test.png)

At this point, if you've completed all the activities mentioned above, continue with the main story. Head to Nord Highlands - South and go to the southeast corner of the map. You should see a **red exclamation mark** on the map indicating the location. Millium will put out a ladder for you. Climb up the ladder and move to the end, then select the first choice when you're ready to proceed.

**Watchtower**

[![Trails of cold steel ii watchtower a.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/c/c9/Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_watchtower_a.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_watchtower_a.png) [![Trails of cold steel ii watchtower b.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/c/ce/Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_watchtower_b.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_watchtower_b.png)

As soon as you enter the tower, you will be facing some Alliance Forces Soldiers, these guys can a little hard but they are very weak against status ailments. Just hit them with a craft skill that will cause Seal and they will be pretty much useless. After you have defeated the soldiers, use the Orbment Charging Station in front of you to fully recover yourself. Then head to the southeast path to find a **Wind Shoes** in a treasure chest. Return back to the starting area and go to the north path. Go all the way to the end, examine the duct, and go to the end to find a **La Forte** quartz. Return back the previous area, and take the stairs up. Then go to the room on the northwest side of the map, open the treasure to get some **Sepith**, then take the southeast path to go upstairs. Then as you try to go north, a group of mercenaries will come after you. Defeat them and move on. You can examine the ducts at the northeast corner, going to end, you will find a **Attack 2** quartz. Return to the previous area and then take the stairs up. Go south, and there is an **EP Charge II** on the southeast room Then take the northeast path to the end, you will be surrounded by another group of mercenaries. Defeat them and head to the northeast end, you will find an Orbment Charging Station. Heal, save and then head outside. Go to the rooftop to fight the boss.

| Enemy List | Item Drop 1 | Item Drop 2 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Tri-Attacker R2 | Teara Balm | U-Material |
| Tri-Attacker HG | EP Charge II | U-Material |
| Alliance Forces Soldier | Teara Balm | EP Charge II |
| Galion Cougar | Red Beast Flesh | U-Material |
| Jaeger - Gun | Teara Balm | EP Charge II |
| Jaeger - Sword | Curia Balm | Reviving Balm |
| Treasure | Location |
| --- | --- |
| Wind Shoes | Watchtower 1F |
| La Forte | Watchtower 1F - Ducts |
| Sepith x100 | Watchtower 2F |
| Attack 2 | Watchtower 3F - Ducts |
| EP Charge II | Watchtower 4F |
| Boss | HP | Elemental Efficacy | Item Drop | Slash | Trust | Pierce | Strike |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Bleublanc | 80869 (Normal) | 90, 90, 90, 90 | N/A | ★☆☆☆ | ☆☆☆☆ | ☆☆☆☆ | ★☆☆☆ |
| Atina | 80869 (Normal) | 90, 90, 90, 90 | N/A | ★☆☆☆ | ★☆☆☆ | ☆☆☆☆ | ☆☆☆☆ |
| This is similar to the boss fight against Xeno and Leonidas. You need to defeat the boss within 40 turns to get the bonus AP. The best way to to unlock that bonus condition is to come in with a full CP party and then use all your buffs and unleash all of your S-Craft at full strength. Once you have used up your S-Craft, have Alisa use her Heavenly Gift to give the entire party a CP regen buff. Then unleash your S-Craft again when it's full. When Bleublanc summons additional mobs, defeat them immediately so they don't take up your turns. Atina can also use her Black Barrier skill which will block a single physical attack, make sure you have someone hit her, to nullify that shield so you don't waste a turn on them. If Bleublanc attacks, he will usually use his cards which can deal a ton of damage and inflict nightmare on one of your characters. |
| Boss | HP | Elemental Efficacy | Item Drop | Idle Stance | Attack Stance |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Drakkhen (Sword) | 95000 (Normal) | 100, 120, 120, 100 | N/A | B:★★★★ | H:★☆☆☆ | A:★★★☆ | B:★☆☆☆ | H:★★★★ | A:★★☆☆ |
| Drakkhen (Gun) | 104800 (Normal) | 120, 100, 100, 120 | N/A | B:★★☆☆ | H:★★★☆ | A:★☆☆☆ | B:★★★★ | H:★☆☆☆ | A:★☆☆☆ |
| Spiegel (Sword) | 155700 (Normal) | 100, 100, 120, 100 | N/A | B:★★★☆ | H:★☆☆☆ | A:★★☆☆ | B:★★★★ | H:☆☆☆☆ | A:★☆☆☆ |
| This is just like your previous mech battle, just focus on defeating one unit at a time. When your co-pilot`s turn is up, I suggest you use a status buff such as Fie`s speed buff to have extra turns. Once you have defeated one mech, the commander unit will come and take it`s place. Since this battle is gonna drag on for while, make sure you have your co-pilot use Shinki to heal yourself, if you ran out of EP, then have your co-pilot use Charge to fully restore your CP. For the Spiegel unit, the best part to hit is the body regardless of it's stance. |

### December 8

* * *

| Recipe: Onion Soup | Purchase the Onion Soup Recipe Book from the General Store. |
| --- | --- |
| Book: Imperial Chronicle Issue #3 | Purchase from the General Store. |
| Book: Gambler Jack II - Chapter 5 | Masha: Ymir Residence (Southeast house) |
| Quest: Azuki's Adventure | Speak to Camilla at the General Store. |

Once you have control over Rean, Go to the general store and speak Camilla to accept the hidden quest. Then speak to her again, purchase the **Onion Soup** recipe and a copy of **Imperial Chronicle Issue #3**. Then enter the house located southeast right beside the tavern. Speak to Masha by the kitchen, she will give you a copy of **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 5**. There is also a new difficulty level added to the [snowboard](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Mini_Games#Snowboarding "walkthrough/Mini Games") mini game. Complete it to receive the **Hare** quartz.

Then speak to Claire southeast of the Baron's Mansion. This will add a page to her profile. Then attend the bonding events, doing Sharon and Toval's bonding event will add a page to their profiles. Then finish the hidden quest. If you decide to head out to Ymir Valley, there is a monster called Snow Rat added to the area, so scan that monster if want the battle trophy.

| Character | Requirements |
| --- | --- |
| Claire [Page 2] | Speak to Claire, southeast of the Baron's Mansion. |
| Sharon [Page 1] | Attend Sharon's Bonding Event. |
| Toval [Page 2] | Attend Toval's Bonding Event. |
| Character | Location | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Alisa | General Store | Link EXP +500 |
| Gaius | Near Phoenix Wings | Link EXP +500 |
| Machias | Tavern | Link EXP +500 |
| Millium | Near Baron's Mansion | Link EXP +500 |
| Sharon | Baron's Mansion - Kitchen Area | Add Page 1 to Sharon's Character Profile.Link EXP +500 |
| Toval | Near Station | Add Page 2 to Toval's Character Profile.Link EXP +500 |

####  [![QuesticonCS2.gif](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/c/c1/QuesticonCS2.gif)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:QuesticonCS2.gif) Hidden Quest: Azuki's Adventure

* * *

Speak to Camilla at the General Store, and accept her request by choosing the first option. To complete the quest, you'll need to talk to the following four NPCs:

1.  Werner - The Phoenix Wings (Kitchen Area)
2.  Gerald - Tavern (Behind the counter)
3.  Luke - Near the Station
4.  Sister Lisa - Septian Church

| Client | Camillia |
| --- | --- |
| Reward and AP | Ymir Manjuu x10, 2000 Mira, 4 AP |

[![MarginCS2Test.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/a/a4/MarginCS2Test.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:MarginCS2Test.png)

Once you have completed all the activities mentioned above, return to your room to conclude Act 1- Part 2. The game will then tally up all the AP (Academic Points) you have earned throughout the chapter. You will achieve an S-Rank if you manage to accumulate a **total of 35 AP**.

| Results | AP |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Reunited with Nord Clasmates | 5 |
| Disabled orbal wave jammer | 8 |
| Beat Bleublanc & Altina quickly | 3 |
| Found and explored the Aria Shrine | 3 |
| Quest: Highlands Hunt | 4 |
| Quest: Foaling Around | 4 |
| Quest: Zats Amore [Hidden] | 4 |
| Quest: Azuki's Adventure [Hidden] | 4 |
